title: FightPlanner 4 Public Beta Test
message: The FightPlanner 4 Public Beta Test is coming very soon! For this occasion, we want to give everyone who wants to participate access to the public beta 1 week before everyone else! To get access, you just need to fill out this form: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSezDc9sv5aBWcGA5RG3Kcs-941maaD2_DCgqt6Qcv4oKs6y8Q/viewform You have until June 20, 2026 at 11:59 PM GMT+2 to complete the form. After that, you won’t be able to submit a response anymore! This version will be the same as the one released to everyone later, so you won’t miss anything. However, if you complete this form, you may receive small cosmetics for FightPlanner in the future!
